# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the relevant issue, if one exists.
- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally.
- [ ] I updated docs, metadata, or changelog entries when needed.
- [ ] I did not commit generated outputs, datasets, checkpoints, or secrets.

## Validation

List the commands, datasets, or checks used to validate the change.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out trade-offs, follow-up work, or places where review focus would help.
